items.question: Are prompts free?
items.answer: Yes. During the beta phase, all PromptFlow prompts are free to explore, copy and save. No credit card, no mandatory sign-up.

items.question: Can I publish my own prompts?
items.answer: Yes. Create an account, go to the creator panel and submit your prompts. After review by our team, they enter the library for the whole community to use.

items.question: Will PromptFlow have paid features?
items.answer: In the future we may launch optional features, such as advanced packs, extra tools or monetization for creators. But the initial phase is completely free.

items.question: Which AI tools are supported?
items.answer: We support prompts for Midjourney, DALL·E 3, Stable Diffusion, Adobe Firefly, Sora, Kling, RunwayML, ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini and much more.

items.question: Do I need an account to use it?
items.answer: No. You can explore and copy prompts without an account. To save favorites and publish your own prompts, just create a free account.

cta.title: Join PromptFlow
cta.subtitle: Publish your prompts, save favorites and help build an open and free library for AI creators.

footer.description: Free and collaborative AI prompts library.
